name: firebase_create_app
description: Use this to create a new Firebase App in the currently active Firebase Project. Firebase Apps can be iOS, Android, or Web.

android_config.description: Configuration for Android apps. Required if platform is 'android'.

package_name.description: The package name for your Android app (e.g., com.example.myapp).

display_name.description: The user-friendly display name for your app. If not provided, a default name may be generated.

ios_config.description: Configuration for iOS apps. Required if platform is 'ios'.

app_store_id.description: The App Store ID for your iOS app.

bundle_id.description: The bundle ID for your iOS app (e.g., com.example.myapp).

platform.description: The platform for which to create an app.
